title: Gradient Checkpointing
summary: A technique used to store intermediate gradients during backpropagation to reduce memory usage. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Gradient-Based Optimizers. Start after Gradient. It opens into Gradient Checkpointing Memory and Gradient Checkpointing (Rematerialize).
